# Health Checks

Monitor IPs or hostnames and get notified of issues

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/health-checks/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Health Checks](https://developers.cloudflare.com/health-checks/index.md): Monitor origin server availability and get notified of status changes.

## Get started

- [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/health-checks/get-started/index.md): Create and configure Health Checks to monitor your origin servers.

## Health Checks Analytics

- [Health Checks Analytics](https://developers.cloudflare.com/health-checks/health-checks-analytics/index.md): View Health Checks status history and response time analytics.

## concepts

- [Health Checks regions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/health-checks/concepts/health-checks-regions/index.md): Cloudflare data center regions used for Health Checks monitoring.

## how-to

- [Health Checks notifications](https://developers.cloudflare.com/health-checks/how-to/health-checks-notifications/index.md): Set up notifications for Health Checks status changes.
- [Zone Lockdown](https://developers.cloudflare.com/health-checks/how-to/zone-lockdown/index.md): Restrict Health Checks access to specific Cloudflare IP addresses.
